name: ConfirmDialog
description: ConfirmDialog uses a Dialog UI with confirmDialog method or <ConfirmDialog> tag.

props.name: group
props.description: Optional key to match the key of the confirmation, useful to target a specific confirm dialog instance.

props.name: breakpoints
props.description: Object literal to define widths per screen size.

props.name: draggable
props.description: Enables dragging to change the position using header.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.name: message
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Message of the component */ message: ConfirmationOptions; }): VNode[]

slots.name: icon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Style class of the icon template */ class: any; }): VNode[]

slots.name: container
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Message of the component */ message: any; /** * Close dialog function. */ closeCallback: () => void; /** * Accept function of the component */ acceptCallback: () => void; /** * Reject function of the component */ rejectCallback: () => void; /** * Initialize drag function for custom container elements. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ initDragCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
